attacking_style: No attacking pattern evident - observations show rider in domestique/support role or struggling to maintain contact with leaders on climbs.
team_tactics: Deployed as key mountain domestique for EF leadership, expected to support through climbs but reliability compromised by mechanical issues and form struggles.
terrain_preference: No clear terrain strength demonstrated in observations; mountain finishes consistently exposed weakness rather than showcasing ability.
vulnerability: Premature drops on sustained climbs even when arriving with strong preparatory form (Dauphiné). Susceptible to crashes and mechanicals at critical race junctures.
key_patterns: DNF/DNS pattern: abandoned or withdrew in 2 of 4 observed race appearances
Form deterioration within Grand Tours: struggled early climbs then crashed, indicating poor multi-week resilience
Prep race form doesn't translate: strong Dauphiné followed by immediate Tour struggles
Mechanical/crash vulnerability at critical moments: puncture abandonment and Stage 7 crash elimination
form_trajectory: negative: 2019 Tour showed clear deterioration from strong Dauphiné to premature drops by Stage 6, crash Stage 7, DNS Stage 13 with fracture
